title: Management Store
description: Enhance your Management Wanted experience with Management Store!
body:
Management Store is an addon for Management Wanted that expands the game's restaurant experience by redesigning the pizza restaurant store and adding new world-generated pizza restaurant structures.

Whether you're building a bustling city, running a roleplay server, or simply exploring your world, Management Store brings greater variety and immersion to every playthrough.

Features

🍕 Pizza Store Revamp

Updated appearance for the pizza restaurant store.
Improved visual style that better fits modern city environments.

🏢 New Generated Structures

Brand-new pizza restaurant buildings can generate naturally in your world.
Increased diversity and realism for towns, cities, and exploration.

🌎 More World Variety

Makes urban areas feel more unique and less repetitive.
Adds new points of interest for players to discover.

🔧 Designed for Management Wanted

Built specifically to complement and expand the Management Wanted experience.
Perfect For
City-building worlds
Economy and business servers
Roleplay communities
Players looking for more variety in generated structures

Bring new restaurants, new locations, and new opportunities to your world with Management Store. 🍕✨
